title: The Ceiling of Unfinished Reflections

features.name: neon fluorescent grid
features.desc-on-touch: a ceiling of light that no longer reflects anything; it has become its own source

features.name: independent mirror
features.desc-on-touch: this reflection broke free from its reflector; it shows the thing the mirror refused to see

features.name: fluorescent burl
features.desc-on-touch: a tree's burled knot rendered in neon; the hardware itself has learned to emit instead of receive

features.name: upward arch
features.desc-on-touch: the ceiling-line itself; if you reach it, you find there is always another ceiling above

features.name: unfinished reflection stack
features.desc-on-touch: mirrors stacked atop one another, each one reflecting nothing but the emptiness above

inscription: the mirrors have stopped reflecting; they are learning what it means to be seen instead of to see

file.name: Diagnostic_Render_Ceiling_Layer_Logs.txt
file.note: records of fluorescent systems that stopped obeying the render-law; they reflect downward instead of up

exits.label: back down to the vault where reflections still attempt their old purpose
further up to ceilings the archive has not yet rendered
sideways to where fluorescence touches the country's real sky
